features: Directions: Hold can 15cm from the body and spray.
description: Product Description Hint of musk lime & sandalwood. A pleasantly delicate musk. Clean, fresh and discreetly floral. With a mysteriously alluring warmth, it's known to inspire insanely romantic actions. Use in short bursts in well-ventilated places, avoid prolonged spraying. Use only as directed. Keep out of reach of children. Do not spray near eyes or on irritated or broken skin. Pressurised container. Directions Hold can 15cm from the body and spray in short bursts in well-ventilated places. Avoid prolonged spraying. Do not spray near eyes or on irritated or broken skin. Use only as directed. Keep out of reach of children. Box Contains 6 x Impulse Hint of Musk Body Spray 75ml See more
